title: Old But New
description: Brings back mechanics from legacy MC.
body:
## What is the modpack for?
This modpack is for anyone who just misses how Minecraft used to feel. The look and the way the world generated, it’s all built to bring back those classic vibes without going full legacy. It keeps things simple and familiar, with that legacy feel that a lot of us grew up with.
## What are some things in this modpack?
1. Sword Blocking.
2. Vertical Bobbing.
3. Legacy UI. (Not all UI)
4. Legacy World Generation/
5. Legacy Name Tags
6. Etc.
## Why you should get this modpack.
- It brings back the good stuff. Old generation and some features that got removed over time. it’s like giving the current game a little throwback vibe.

- It’s still the Minecraft you know. Nothing too crazy or overcomplicated, just a few changes that make it feel more like the older days without breaking anything.

- Chill to play. Whether you're building, exploring, or just messing around, the vibe is simple and laid-back — no need to learn 50 new systems.

- Runs well. It’s not a massive modpack as of right now, so it won’t tank your FPS or not take that forever to load.

- Hits that nostalgia feel. If you ever played Minecraft years ago, this will probably make you smile. And if you didn’t, it’s still a fun way to see what it used to be like.

## 
### QnA
Q1: Now some of yall may be wondering will this ever come to forge as well?

A1: As of right now, No but it could be possible in the future.
